info_types.name: MessageCount ESN
info_types.description: Number of messages to report Engine Serial Number.
info_types.description_zh: 报告发动机序列号所需消息数。

info_types.name: Engine Serial Number
info_types.description: Up to 17 printable ASCII characters, preceded by fill bytes $00. Same message format as VIN.
info_types.description_zh: 最多17个可打印ASCII字符，前面填充$00字节。与VIN相同的消息格式。

info_types.name: MessageCount EROTAN
info_types.description: Number of messages to report Exhaust Regulation Or Type Approval Number.
info_types.description_zh: 报告排放法规或型式批准号所需消息数。

info_types.name: Exhaust Regulation Or Type Approval Number
info_types.name_zh: 排放法规或型式批准号
info_types.description: Up to 17 printable ASCII characters (EROTAN). Defined by vehicle manufacturer per Type Approval office.
info_types.description_zh: 最多17个可打印ASCII字符(EROTAN)。由整车厂按型式批准机构定义。

info_types.name: WWH-OBD GTR Number
info_types.description: 11 ASCII characters: GTR_XXX.xxx identifying GTR revision for WWH-OBD compliance.
info_types.description_zh: 11个ASCII字符：GTR_XXX.xxx标识WWH-OBD合规的GTR修订版本。

info_types.name: Fueled Engine Operation Ignition Cycle Counter
info_types.name_zh: 燃油发动机运行点火循环计数器
info_types.description: 2-byte counter incremented within 10s if fueled engine operation for ≥2s ±1s. Required for PHEV, optional for others.
info_types.description_zh: 2字节计数器，如果燃油发动机运行≥2s±1s则在10s内递增。PHEV必须，其他可选。

_sub_fields.label: FEOCNTR
_sub_fields.name: Fueled Engine Operation Ignition Cycle Counter
_sub_fields.name_zh: 燃油发动机运行点火循环计数器

info_types.name: Certification Test Group/Engine Family Number
info_types.name_zh: 认证测试组/发动机系列号
info_types.description: 12 ASCII characters identifying the Test Group (LD) or Engine Family Number (HD). Default $3F [?] if unavailable.
info_types.description_zh: 12个ASCII字符标识测试组（轻型车）或发动机系列号（重型车）。不可用时默认$3F [?]。

info_types.name: Distance Traveled Since Evap Monitoring Decision
info_types.name_zh: 蒸发监测决策后行驶距离
info_types.description: 2-byte, 1 km/count, 0~65535 km. Reset $0000 on pass/fail decision. Reset $FFFF on Service $04 or reprogram. Does not wrap.
info_types.description_zh: 2字节，1 km/计数，0~65535 km。通过/失败决策时重置为$0000。服务$04或重新编程时重置为$FFFF。不回绕。

_sub_fields.label: EVAP_DIST
_sub_fields.name: Distance Traveled Since Evap Monitoring Decision
_sub_fields.name_zh: 蒸发监测决策后行驶距离

info_types.name: Applicable Motorcycle Category for Type Approval
info_types.name_zh: 适用摩托车型式批准类别
info_types.description_zh: 1字节：0x00=保留，0x01=L3e-A2（中等性能），0x02=L3e-A3（高性能），0x03-0xFF=保留。
